subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One for him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that My call and My remembrance may draw him unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیجذبه ندائی و ذکری الی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
